overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting ancient Alexandria. The player character rides a horse along a coastal path toward the Lighthouse of Alexandria, dismounts to explore the monument on foot, walking up stairs, around the coastal perimeter, and through interior courtyards before ascending to the lighthouse mechanism at the top. The environment features classical Ptolemaic architecture with white stone walls, red banners, and Mediterranean coastal vegetation.

events.description: character dismounts horse and transitions to walking

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along the coastal dirt path, following other riders toward the lighthouse, then dismounting to continue on foot

notable_agents.action: fellow rider on horseback traveling ahead of ego toward the lighthouse

entered.detail: sandy dirt trail running along the coastline
tall white stone tower with multiple tiers and red accents
blue coastal water visible beyond the path
tall palm trees lining the coastal path
large stone formations and boulders along the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character riding a horse along a coastal dirt path. The Lighthouse of Alexandria dominates the distant center, with the Mediterranean Sea visible to the left and scattered palm trees providing sparse vegetation. Other riders are visible ahead, and the camera moves steadily forward along the trail.

events.description: transitioning from dirt path to paved stone stairs and entrance plaza
beginning to ascend the main stone stairs toward the lighthouse entrance

agents.ego_description: walking up the wide stone stairs toward the lighthouse entrance, passing other pedestrians and guards

notable_agents.action: guard or citizen walking up the stairs ahead of the player

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to the lighthouse entrance
large stone sphinx statues flanking the entrance stairs
vertical red banners hanging from the lighthouse walls
ornate stone tile work on the entrance plaza

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the dirt path onto a paved stone plaza and begins ascending the grand stairs of the lighthouse. The massive white tower looms larger, flanked by sphinx statues and red banners. Other pedestrians move up and down the stairs, and the camera follows the central path toward the main entrance.

events.description: turning left onto side coastal path away from main stairs
turning back toward the main entrance archway

agents.ego_description: walking along the side coastal path to observe the water and burning braziers, then turning back toward the entrance

entered.detail: clear blue water of the Mediterranean coastline
large bronze bowl with burning fire on stone pedestal
rocky coast with clear tidal pools
sailing ships visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left onto a side walkway running along the rocky coastline. A large fire brazier burns in a bronze bowl near the water's edge, with ancient ships visible sailing in the distance. The path offers a view of the lighthouse's base and the clear Mediterranean waters before turning back toward the main entrance.

events.description: passing through stone archway into interior courtyard
turning right to explore side courtyard with tents

agents.ego_description: walking through the archway into the interior courtyard, exploring side areas with military tents and construction materials

notable_agents.action: guard standing near the red canvas tent

entered.detail: large stone passage leading into the interior
enclosed courtyard with dirt ground and stone walls
military-style canvas tent with red roof
wooden wheeled cart with goods
wooden scaffolding structure against the wall
circular domed structure with columns

segments.scene_description: Passing through a stone archway, the scene transitions to an interior courtyard with military tents, wooden carts, and construction scaffolding. The camera explores the side areas, showing the functional service areas of the lighthouse complex, with stone walls enclosing the space and a domed structure visible in the distance.

events.description: beginning ascent of long stone staircase to upper level
reaching the upper platform with the lighthouse fire mechanism

agents.ego_description: climbing the long stone stairs to the upper level of the lighthouse, approaching the mechanism

entered.detail: steep stone staircase ascending to the lighthouse top
large bronze fire basin with smoke rising from the top
white marble columns supporting the structure
intricate carved panels on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a long, steep stone staircase toward the top of the lighthouse. The view opens up to reveal the lighthouse mechanism—a large bronze fire basin emitting smoke. Marble columns and carved stone reliefs decorate the upper structure as the camera reaches the summit platform.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide coastal approach that gradually ascends into the heights of the Lighthouse of Alexandria. It begins with a steady ride along a dirt path flanked by palm trees and the Mediterranean Sea, moving toward the distant white tower. As the terrain shifts from dirt to a paved stone plaza, the camera follows the character up grand stairs flanked by sphinxes and red banners before turning toward a rocky side walkway where bronze braziers burn beside the water. The scene then transitions through a stone archway into a functional interior courtyard filled with military tents and scaffolding, shifting the perspective from the public exterior to the monument's service areas. Finally, the camera climbs a steep stone staircase, emerging at the summit platform to reveal a massive bronze fire basin emitting smoke amidst marble columns and carved reliefs.
